title: echinochloa crus-galli var. mitis
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli var. mitis, also known as Japanese barnyard grass, is a type of wild grass native to Asia and parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Echinochloa crus-galli var. mitis is often used in teas, infusions, or dried as a powder for its medicinal purposes.
